p2p_enrich.notes: CI Discovery: Repo is pytorch/pytorch with build-system using cmake/ninja. CI commands found: (1) lintrunner for linting (FLAKE8, CLANGFORMAT, PYFMT, RUFF, etc. from .lintrunner.toml), (2) python test/run_test.py for running tests via CI scripts (.ci/pytorch/run_tests.sh, .ci/pytorch/test.sh), (3) pytest not directly used - tests run via custom test runner. Usable p2p gates: AST validation and import parsing (PyTorch requires full build which is not available in test env). Tests added: test_p2p_repo_ast_valid, test_p2p_repo_imports_parse. Both pass on base commit.

validate.notes: All validation checks passed: Docker build successful, NOP test reward=0 (tests correctly fail on base commit), Gold test reward=1 (all tests pass with fix applied), Rubric ICR=1.0 (gold solution follows all style/convention rules).
